_comment: Canonical GET /v1/recap/:year/:month contract fixture for issue #96. Backend tests parse both `response` variants against MonthlyRecapResponseSchema (packages/shared-contracts/src/api/recap.ts).

data.narrative: This month you sat with Scripture 11 times. Two passages kept returning: Matthew 11, Psalm 46. You marked the week of the 14th as heavy; Kairos met you in micro moments that week.
You didn't sit with Scripture this month. Whenever you're ready, Kairos will be here.
